title: Etsy, Inc. (ETSY) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: The 27 analysts that cover Etsy stock have a consensus rating of Hold and an average price target of $60, which forecasts a 13.57% increase in the stock price over the next year. The lowest target is $37 and the highest is $83. Analysts forecast that ETSY's EPS will be $2.59 for 2026, with the lowest EPS forecast at $1.78 and the highest at $3.37. 2026 revenue forecast is $2.78 billion. Revenue is forecast to grow 3.7% per year on average during the next 3 years, compared to a 10% growth forecast for the Multiline Retail industry in the US. The analyst consensus reflects a mixed outlook for Etsy, with some bullish views on AI-driven growth initiatives and margin improvement potential, while others remain cautious about near-term GMS trends and consumer discretionary pressures. Notable analyst perspectives include concerns about competitive intensity from larger e-commerce platforms and optimism around Etsy's focus on high-margin advertising and services revenues.
